SELECT sys.getfile(url) AS last_file_part FROM (SELECT url FROM test_urls WHERE url IS NOT NULL) AS filtered_urls;
SELECT a.url, sys.getfile(a.url) FROM test_urls a JOIN (SELECT url FROM test_urls WHERE url LIKE 'http%') b ON a.url = b.url;
SELECT sys.getfile(url) FROM (SELECT url FROM test_urls ORDER BY url LIMIT 5) AS limited_urls;
SELECT COUNT(*), sys.getfile(url) FROM test_urls GROUP BY sys.getfile(url);
